title: stage_review crashed on asset-less proposals (B0041 validate predates B0039 inject)
why: Loop A tick 15 crashed at stage_review: load_proposal().validate() (added by B0041 fail-fast) constructs a Proposal, but the Proposal dataclass requires asset (no default), and the hypothesizer is asset-blind by design (firewall). B0039 only injected asset at run_preflight, which runs AFTER stage_review. So every asset-less proposal hit TypeError (uncaught, since the except only catches ProposalValidationError) before reaching DA. Regression surfaced because ticks 9-14 predated the B0041 validate-before-DA addition. Fixed by injecting asset from current_tick state at the top of stage_review (idempotent, mirrors the B0039 run_preflight inject).
value_rationale: Loop A was fully blocked at stage_review for any new tick until fixed; HIGH because it gated all autonomous research.
